text.div:
EMC-CDS

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://fhir.org/guides/who/emcare/ImplementationGuide/who.fhir.emc-cds

This implementation guide provides implementation resources and guidance in support of applying the WHO recommendations on emergency care.</br>This implementation guide is part of the WHO Smart Guidelines approach to support countries to integrate WHO global data and health recommendations into digital systems accurately and consistently.

name: EMC-CDS
title: WHO Emergency Care Guideline Implementation Guide
description: This implementation guide provides implementation resources and guidance in support of applying the WHO recommendations on emergency care.</br>This implementation guide is part of the WHO Smart Guidelines approach to support countries to integrate WHO global data and health recommendations into digital systems accurately and consistently.
